<thought>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04, column D. Moving forward from my current position will move me into a lava cell at row 03, column B, which is dangerous. I should avoid lava. 

To reach the goal safely, I should turn right and move towards the goal. Turning right means rotating clockwise from facing down (`v`) to facing left (`<`). However, facing left means going into column A which is a wall (`#`). So turning left instead (counter-clockwise) from down (`v`) to right (`>`) is better. 

I will rotate 90 degrees clockwise to face right (`>`), then I can move forward safely into the floor cells towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>
